## Checklist

- [ ] Targets `develop` (or `main` only for a release/hotfix)
- [ ] `npm run lint` and `npm test` pass
- [ ] Conventional commit messages
- [ ] Specs / ADRs / `CLAUDE.md` updated if behaviour or decisions changed
- [ ] No changes under `core/` (vendored template) — or justified below
- [ ] No regex used in string handling (template rule)
